name_en: 🔥Balloon New Small Canvas Bucket Bag 👜It looks like a bucket bag from the outside, using strong calfskin 🐮for the round bottom, plus Napa soft leather for the body. The leather is super comfortable and delicate, making its silhouette round like a balloon 🎈A Loewe💎we Anagram dice 🎲is a highlight on the knotted leather cord ✨Structured yet relaxed drawstring bag, using an intriguing structure to achieve a classic proportion and clean lining silhouette 🤎A rigid external base supports the soft inner pouch 🎀ensuring a sturdy design 🥰Holds a soft interior body comfortably. Lightweight and comfortable to wear. This version is made of raffia and leather *Adjustable shoulder strap 🧸Drawstring closure. Crossbody or hand carry, multiple ways to wear *Stylish, youthful and versatile 💐
